achievements.title: Time to Play Soccer
achievements.description: Finish the Prologue.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: One-Touch Overlords
achievements.description: In Chapter 1 during the 1st half of the match against Royal Academy perform a goal shot.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: First Victory
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 1 'Royal Academy is Here!'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: I Still Can't Feel It
achievements.description: In Chapter 2 during the match against Inazuma Kids FC score five goals with Kevin Dragonfly.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Using Your Last Breath
achievements.description: In Chapter 2 during the match against Occult score at least four goals.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: The Dragon Awakes
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 2 'The Dream Begins!'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Look at Your Own Skills
achievements.description: In Chapter 3 during the match against Umbrella score two goals with Bobby Shearer while his formation position is somewhere within Raimon's penalty area.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: One Team, One Dream
achievements.description: In Chapter 3 during the match against Wild let every Raimon player touch the ball then score a goal without Wild intercepting it.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Wild, Wilder, the Wildest!
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 3 'Intrigue at Raimon'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Shattered Dimension
achievements.description: In Chapter 4 during the match against Brainwashing break the brainwashing device by using Inazuma-1.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: A New Training Facility
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 4 'Uncover the Secret Facility'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Youth Is Catching Up
achievements.description: In Chapter 5 during the match against Street Sally's win the match with a ball possession of 75% or more.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Spectacular Strategy
achievements.description: In Chapter 5 during the match against Otaku win the match by scoring goals only using headers from William Glass.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Winners Never Cheat
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 5 'Beware the Maid Café?!'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Keep It Risky
achievements.description: In Chapter 6 during the match against Royal Academy score a goal with Mark Evans while his formation position is inside the goal.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Fair Play – Fair Win
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 6 'Toe-to-Toe with Royal Academy'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Old and Rusty
achievements.description: In Chapter 7 during the match against the Veterans win the match without letting the Veterans do any goal shots.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Fiery Friendship Falcon
achievements.description: In Chapter 7 during the match against Shuriken win the match by scoring only two goals, the first using 'Fire Rooster' and the second using 'Fire Tornado'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Old Blood Revived
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 7 'The Return of the Legends'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Walled This Neigh
achievements.description: In Chapter 8 during the match against Farm perform ten goal shots.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Fall of the Wall
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 8 'Break the Infinite Wall!'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Defense Force X
achievements.description: In Chapter 9 during the match against Kirkwood win the match without letting Kirkwood score any goals.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: The End Is Near
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 9 'No Man Is An Island'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mortal Society
achievements.description: In Chapter 10 during the match against Zeus win the match without using any special moves.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Legendary Inazuma Eleven
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 10 'The Last Battle Awaits'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Ring Around the Rivals
achievements.description: Win a rematch against Inazuma Kids FC at the River Bank.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Playground Bully
achievements.description: Win a rematch against Umbrella at the River Bank.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mark Your District
achievements.description: Win a rematch against Street Sally's at the Spare Ground.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Legends Never Rest
achievements.description: Win a rematch against the Veterans inside the Secret Warehouse.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Cat-tain of the Club
achievements.description: Obtain the Athletics Club key from a cat near the tower.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Maybi It Openz Sumthin
achievements.description: Obtain the Cycling Club key from a girl in Mark's neighbourhood.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Unconventional Dragon Summoning
achievements.description: Obtain a manual of 'Baby Dragon' on the roof of Raimon Jr. High.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.description: Clear Silvia's extra competition top route and claim your reward.
